parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "firstName": "{{ $json.firstName }}",
  "emailAddress": "{{ $json.email }}",
  "phoneNumber": "{{ $json.phone }}",
  "accountName": "{{ $json.companyName }}",
  "cDealTier": "Checklist Started",
  "status": "New",
  "source": "{{ $json.source }}",
  "description": "Started checklist at {{ $json.startedReadable }}. Source: {{ $json.source }}. Awaiting completion.",
  "cUtmSource": "checklist",
  "cUtmMedium": "form"
}

={ "from": "AIandWEBservices ", "to": ["david@aiandwebservices.com"], "reply_to": "{{ $json.email }}", "subject": "{{ $json.emailSubject }}", "html": "
{{ $json.priorityLabel }}

Lead Started Checklist

{{ $json.firstName }}{{ $json.hasCompany ? ' from ' + $json.companyName + '' : '' }} just started the AI Readiness Checklist but has not submitted yet.

Email{{ $json.email }}
Phone{{ $json.hasPhone ? $json.phone : '—' }}
Company{{ $json.hasCompany ? $json.companyName : '—' }}
Source{{ $json.source }}
Started{{ $json.startedReadable }} EST

They will receive a score email when they submit. If they go quiet for 24h — especially a customer source — consider a proactive outreach.

Reply to this email to reach {{ $json.firstName }} directly — their address is set as reply-to.

" }

meta.description: Fires when user clicks Start Assessment on the checklist email step. Creates EspoCRM lead with status Checklist Started and emails David a priority-flagged notification. Source=customer triggers urgent red banner.
